content.problemStatement:
In mathematics, the degree of polynomials in one variable is the highest power of the variable in the algebraic expression with non-zero coefficient.

Chef has a polynomial in one variable xxx with NNN terms. The polynomial looks like A0⋅x0+A1⋅x1+…+AN−2⋅xN−2+AN−1⋅xN−1A_0\cdot x^0 + A_1\cdot x^1 + \ldots + A_{N-2}\cdot x^{N-2} + A_{N-1}\cdot x^{N-1}A0​⋅x0+A1​⋅x1+…+AN−2​⋅xN−2+AN−1​⋅xN−1 where Ai−1A_{i-1}Ai−1​ denotes the coefficient of the ithi^{th}ith term xi−1x^{i-1}xi−1 for all (1≤i≤N)(1\le i\le N)(1≤i≤N).

Find the degree of the polynomial.

**Note:** It is guaranteed that there exists **at least** one term with non-zero coefficient.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
First line of each test case contains of a single integer NNN - the number of terms in the polynomial.
Second line of each test case contains of NNN space-separated integers - the ithi^{th}ith integer Ai−1A_{i-1}Ai−1​ corresponds to the coefficient of xi−1x^{i-1}xi−1.


Output Format
For each test case, output in a single line, the degree of the polynomial.
constraints: At least one coefficient in each test case is non‑zero
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case: first line contains an integer N, the number of terms. The second line contains N space‑separated integers A0 … A(N‑1) where Ai is the coefficient of x^i.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line containing the degree of the polynomial, i.e., the largest i (0‑based) such that Ai ≠ 0.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Test case 1: only coefficient 5 at x^0 → degree 0.
Test case 2: coefficients -3 (x^0) and 3 (x^1) → highest non‑zero index 1.
Test case 3: only non‑zero coefficient is 5 at x^2 → degree 2.
Test case 4: last non‑zero coefficient is 4 at x^2 → degree 2.
Only the coefficient of x^4 is non‑zero, so the degree is 4.
First polynomial: non‑zero coefficient at x^0 → degree 0.\nSecond polynomial: highest non‑zero coefficient is -5 at x^3 → degree 3.

solution.approach: For each test case we scan the coefficients from left to right while remembering the last index where the coefficient is non‑zero. After reading all N coefficients the stored index is the degree. This is O(N) per test case and uses O(1) extra memory.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T * N) where N is the number of coefficients in each test case.
